required_preferences.fact: Keeps in close touch with her sister throughout the semester abroad via flexible, unscheduled text and voice notes — no longer insists on weekly video calls

supersedes.fact: Never misses Sunday video chats with her sister — reschedules other plans if needed

required_preferences.fact: Avoids all social plans that would require Willow to miss a medication dose or disrupt her special diet — only makes plans if cat care is completely secured and aligned with Willow’s new medical schedule

supersedes.fact: Only adopts new social plans if Willow, her cat, can be cared for without disruption

required_preferences.fact: Tracks Willow’s symptoms and medication administration in a dedicated pet health journal reviewed weekly with the vet
Plans weekly shared dinners at home with her partner, rotating responsibility for cooking each time
Takes prescribed iron supplements every day after her main meal — sets a daily phone alarm as a reminder and avoids dairy within an hour of the dose
Sets up a combined home studio with her partner, dividing workspace zones and collaborating on creative projects at least once a week

persona: A freelance graphic designer who sells custom prints online
